## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/MQajiEzBe6qU9EBkkVeNCWncaXD4Jy34?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is strong: articles gaining impressions, CTR up, new articles ranking well](https://fathom.video/share/MQajiEzBe6qU9EBkkVeNCWncaXD4Jy34?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Production plan: 10 blog articles and 10 integration pages per week, focusing on use case articles](https://fathom.video/share/MQajiEzBe6qU9EBkkVeNCWncaXD4Jy34?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Research sprint planned for strategy optimization, including LLM tracking and workflow upgrades](https://fathom.video/share/MQajiEzBe6qU9EBkkVeNCWncaXD4Jy34?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Content redistribution initiatives discussed: social media drafts, Medium publishing automation, video-to-blog conversion](https://fathom.video/share/MQajiEzBe6qU9EBkkVeNCWncaXD4Jy34?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
